title: Tab Folders for Google Sheets — organize sheet tabs into collapsible groups
description: A free Chrome extension that groups your Google Sheets tabs into collapsible, color-coded folders. Tell us you want it — one click gauges demand.
body_html:
Workbooks with 30, 50, 80 tabs turn the tab bar into soup. Tab Folders for Google Sheets groups your sheet tabs into collapsible, color-coded folders — monthly sheets in one group, raw data in another, dashboards pinned — without touching the spreadsheet itself. Free, runs entirely in your browser, no account.

What it will do

  • Drag tabs into named, color-coded folders; collapse a folder to one chip.
  • Keyboard-jump to any tab in any folder (works with our Tab Search extension).
  • Per-workbook layouts, remembered locally. Nothing leaves your browser.

→ Install the free extension

Honest note

This one is in development — the install button above records your interest (a single anonymous counter, nothing else). If enough people click, we ship it; the working build follows the same free-core model as our other extensions. No email asked, no tracking beyond the click count.
